checks.description: When mul_a=1 and mul_b=2 are driven, mul_out must eventually equal the product 2 within a conservative observation window.
checks.pass_condition: mul_out equals 2 (binary 0010) at any observation point after the inputs are applied and before any further input changes.
checks.trigger_condition: When the stimulus program for case basic_001 drives mul_a=1, mul_b=2 and rst_n=1.

checks.description: The product output mul_out must never contain unknown (X) or high-impedance (Z) values after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: All bits of mul_out are 0 or 1 (no X/Z) in every observation after reset is deasserted.
checks.trigger_condition: While monitoring post-reset behavior in any case.
